## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Pipeline / prompt change (`CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Template knowledge file (kept generic)

## Checklist

- [ ] No organization-specific data (real hostnames, account IDs, IdP tiles,
      Notion IDs, names, internal process detail) — templates use fake placeholders
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or captured evidence committed
- [ ] The human review gate is preserved (uploads remain **drafts only**, no auto-submit)
- [ ] Changes stay org-agnostic and read config from `config.yaml`
- [ ] Ran the quick checks: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py`, `bash -n install.sh`
- [ ] Updated `CLAUDE.md` / `README.md` if behavior or setup changed
